meta.description: canon25 — 25-user set, UBPS Canon governs every user. ALL 16 root Beliefs list "bs.canon" in their sets[] to declare UBPS membership, the 7 unit-subscribers inherit it transitively, and the 2 previously belief-less users now point at the canon-only root b.canon-only — so every one of the 25 users resolves to a final Belief containing bs.canon. The canon Q/A + bs.canon themselves are NOT baked in (single-source / always-latest) — supply them at run time with `--include scripts/seedUbps/canon.json` (idempotent, base-wins merge). This is the DEFAULT UBPS seed that `pnpm seed:testnet` auto-loads (with canon.json auto-included).
meta.notes: Default seed path: `pnpm seed:testnet` loads this file (scripts/seedUbps/canon25.testnet.json) and auto-includes scripts/seedUbps/canon.json. Explicit form: pnpm seed:ubps:dry --file scripts/seedUbps/canon25.testnet.json --include scripts/seedUbps/canon.json . Without canon.json merged, validation fails (bs.canon undefined) — by design.

questions.text: Should the state redistribute wealth through progressive taxation?
Is a universal basic income a good policy?
Should major industries be publicly owned?
Is free-market capitalism the best economic system?
Should there be a high national minimum wage?
Should healthcare be free at the point of use?
Is strong financial regulation necessary?
Is globalization good for ordinary workers?
Should immigration be open and welcoming?
Is liberal democracy the best system of government?
Should the state have broad surveillance powers?
Should political power be decentralized to regions?
Should money in politics be strictly limited?
Should the death penalty be legal?
Is national sovereignty more important than global cooperation?
Should military spending be increased?
Does God exist?
Should religion influence public policy?
Is faith compatible with science?
Is there life after death?
Should children be raised in their family's religion?
Is morality possible without religion?
Should religious institutions be tax-exempt?
Should the state be strictly secular?
Is individual freedom more important than collective welfare?
Should society prioritize tradition over progress?
Should diversity be actively promoted in institutions?
Should euthanasia be legal?
Should recreational drug use be decriminalized?
Is the traditional family the foundation of society?
Is personal privacy more important than public safety?
Should education be standardized for everyone?
